entity.summary: Account-based premium product within the ChangeNOW ecosystem whose paid Pro plans launched in Q3 2024, offering balances, reduced-fee off-chain conversions, cashback, staking, loans, and other account features while relying on third-party providers for some custody and execution functions.
entity.notes: ChangeNOW's base instant-exchange service launched in September 2017, but the reviewed record is specifically ChangeNOW Pro. Official whitepaper history places the predecessor Premium Lounge in Q2 2019 and the launch of ChangeNOW Pro plans in Q3 2024. July 1 is used as a quarter-level marker. The frozen queue requires type cex, although current Pro terms describe ChangeNOW Pro as a technical interface using third-party providers for some services.

expected.summary: Seychelles-based centralized exchange launched in 2017 and still operating under the ChangeNOW Pro brand.

changes.summary: Account-based premium product within the ChangeNOW ecosystem whose paid Pro plans launched in Q3 2024, offering balances, reduced-fee off-chain conversions, cashback, staking, loans, and other account features while relying on third-party providers for some custody and execution functions.
changes.notes: ChangeNOW's base instant-exchange service launched in September 2017, but the reviewed record is specifically ChangeNOW Pro. Official whitepaper history places the predecessor Premium Lounge in Q2 2019 and the launch of ChangeNOW Pro plans in Q3 2024. July 1 is used as a quarter-level marker. The frozen queue requires type cex, although current Pro terms describe ChangeNOW Pro as a technical interface using third-party providers for some services.

events.title: ChangeNOW Pro plans launched in Q3 2024
events.description: ChangeNOW's official whitepaper timeline records the launch of ChangeNOW Pro plans during the third quarter of 2024, separating the Pro product from the ecosystem's 2017 instant-exchange launch.
events.notes: July 1 is used as a quarter-level marker because the source establishes Q3 2024 rather than an exact day.

events.title: ChangeNOW introduced the Premium Lounge predecessor in Q2 2019
events.description: ChangeNOW introduced Premium Lounge, the account-based predecessor referenced by current ChangeNOW Pro terms, during the second quarter of 2019.
events.notes: April 1 is used as a quarter-level marker for Q2 2019.

evidence.title: ChangeNOW Whitepaper version 1.8
evidence.notes: The official whitepaper timeline places the launch of ChangeNOW Pro plans in Q3 2024.

evidence.title: ChangeNOW Whitepaper version 1.8
evidence.notes: The official timeline records the introduction of Premium Lounge in Q2 2019 and the initial instant-exchange launch in September 2017.

evidence.title: ChangeNOW Pro product page
evidence.notes: The current official page verifies active ChangeNOW Pro account, conversion, cashback, staking, and related features.

evidence.title: ChangeNOW company information
evidence.notes: The official company page identifies CHN Group LLC as incorporated in Saint Vincent and the Grenadines and distinguishes the broader ChangeNOW ecosystem from its products.

evidence.title: ChangeNOW Pro Terms
evidence.notes: The current terms describe the Premium Lounge account lineage and state that ChangeNOW Pro uses third-party providers for some custody, exchange, limit-order, and other functionality.
